"scrollable-vertical": false}, {"text": "Länder-Tickets*
• Discover a whole region of Germany together with up to 5 friends.
• Valid on DB regional trains and on services of many regional transport authorities, generally on weekdays from 9 a.m. and all day at weekends and on public holidays.

Schönes-Wochenende-Ticket
• Discover the whole of Germany at the weekend with up to 5 friends.
• Valid on all DB regional trains and on services of many regional transport authorities, generally on Saturdays or Sundays from midnight to 3 a.m. the following day.

Quer-durchs-Land-Ticket
• Discover the whole of Germany at the weekend or weekdays with up to 5 friends.
• Valid on DB regional trains and on services of other participating railways, generally on weekdays from 9 a.m. and all day at weekends and on public holidays.

* The Hessenticket (day ticket for regional trains in Hesse) is currently not yet available as a smartphone ticket.", "resource-id": "de.hafas.android.db:id/webentry_secondary_text", "adapter-view": "android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": true, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.as", "bounds": [14, 1601, 1426, 1797], "componentLabel": "Text Button"}, {"text": "Länder-Tickets*
• Discover a whole region of Germany together with up to 5 friends.
• Valid on DB regional trains and on services of many regional transport authorities, generally on weekdays from 9 a.m. and all day at weekends and on public holidays.

Schönes-Wochenende-Ticket
• Discover the whole of Germany at the weekend with up to 5 friends.
• Valid on all DB regional trains and on services of many regional transport authorities, generally on Saturdays or Sundays from midnight to 3 a.m. the following day.

Quer-durchs-Land-Ticket
• Discover the whole of Germany at the weekend or weekdays with up to 5 friends.
• Valid on DB regional trains and on services of other participating railways, generally on weekdays from 9 a.m. and all day at weekends and on public holidays.

* The Hessenticket (day ticket for regional trains in Hesse) is currently not yet available as a smartphone ticket.", "resource-id": "de.hafas.android.db:id/webentry_secondary_text", "ancestors": ["android.widget.TextView", "android.view.View", "java.lang.Object"], "clickable": false, "class": "android.support.v7.widget.bx", "bounds": [0, 1811, 1440, 2392], "componentLabel": "Text"}]}
